E

email - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.FacultyBean
Email address of the faculty member.
email - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.StudentBean
Email address of the student.
EmailBuilder - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.util
EmailBuilder is a utility class responsible for generating HTML-based email message bodies for different user-related actions such as registration, password recovery, and password updates.
EmailBuilder() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailBuilder
 
emailFromAddress - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailUtility
Email address used to authenticate with SMTP server
EmailMessage - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.util
EmailMessage is a simple JavaBean used for encapsulating the details of an email message such as recipient address, subject, message body, and message type (HTML or plain text).
EmailMessage() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailMessage
Default constructor.
EmailMessage(String, String, String) - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailMessage
Parameterized constructor.
emailPassword - Static variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailUtility
Password for SMTP authentication
EmailUtility - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.util
Utility class used to send email messages using JavaMail API.
EmailUtility() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.EmailUtility
